svg.aria-label: ECA Cognitive Engine v1.1 — Neuro-Fractal Recursive Architecture
svg.title: ECA Cognitive Engine v1.1 — Neuro-Fractal Recursive Architecture
svg.desc: Radial recursive expansion: Metatron's Cube core, seven fractal rings, golden-ratio Trinity arcs, bilateral symmetry — organic left, crystalline right. Void-shift palette: matte black, neon magenta, blood crimson, true white.

g.text: C O G N I T I V E
S Y S T E M
void · metatron · φ · 7 rings · trinity · L-system
